subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Riḍá! Thy mention hath been made and thy name hath triumphed. God willing, through the loving-kindness of the Beloved of the worlds, thou shalt taste the sweetness of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل رضا ذکرت مذکور و اسمت فائز انشاء الله بعنایت محبوب عالم لذت بیان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
